GoogleFormsConfig.title: Google Forms Configuration
GoogleFormsConfig.description: Stores the Google Forms integration settings and entry ID mappings.

nameEntryId.description: Entry parameter for the visitor's Name.

emailEntryId.description: Entry parameter for the visitor's Email.

subjectEntryId.description: Entry parameter for the visitor's Subject.

messageEntryId.description: Entry parameter for the visitor's Message.

isEnabled.description: Whether submission to Google Forms is enabled.

useWeb3Forms.description: Whether to also submit to Web3Forms.

updatedAt.description: When the configuration was last updated.

updatedBy.description: The admin user UID who made the update.

/configs/{configId}.description: System configuration documents. Currently holds the google_forms document.
